formalpara.title: Prelinker indirect function support
formalpara.para: The prelinker now supports indirect functions using the ELF STT_GNU_IFUNC symbol type extension on ARM GNU/Linux targets.

formalpara.title: Prelinker
formalpara.para: The prelinker package is now included in &csl_prod; for &csl_target_name;.

formalpara.title: Prelinker bug fix
formalpara.para: A bug that caused the prelinker to fail to process some binaries has been fixed. The bug caused prelink to fail with a DT_JMPREL tag not adjacent to DT_REL relocations error.

formalpara.title: Prelinker new thread-local storage ABI support
formalpara.para: The prelinker has been improved to support the new optimized thread-local storage ABI recently introduced. This fixes a bug that caused the prelinker to fail with the error Unknown arm relocation type 13.

formalpara.title: Prelinker bug fix
formalpara.para: A bug that caused the prelinker to fail with an Unknown DWARF DW_OP_158 error has been fixed.

formalpara.title: Prelinker bug fix
formalpara.para: A bug that caused the prelinker to fail to process some binaries has been fixed. The bug caused prelink to fail with a .debug_frame unhandled augmentation "S" error.

formalpara.title: Prelinker update
formalpara.para: The prelinker package has been updated from the upstream trunk. This update includes support for version 3 of the DWARF debugging format as well as numerous bug fixes.

formalpara.title: Prelinker bug fix
formalpara.para: A bug that caused the prelinker to crash or fail on some programs has been fixed.

formalpara.title: Prelinker bugs with thread-local storage
formalpara.para: Some bugs affecting the use of the prelinker for programs using thread-local storage have been fixed. These bugs caused the prelinker and prelinked programs to crash.

formalpara.title: Prelinker fix
formalpara.para: A buffer overrun bug when reading ld.so.conf has been fixed. The buffer overrun would cause a dependency tracing failure to be reported.

formalpara.title: Prelinker support for the GNU hash algorithm
formalpara.para: The prelinker now correctly handles binaries that use the GNU hash algorithm, selected by the --hash-style=gnu linker option. Such binaries formerly caused the prelinker to crash.

formalpara.title: Prelinker bugs on Windows hosts
formalpara.para: Several bugs affecting the use of the prelinker on Windows hosts have been fixed. The problems addressed by these fixes include path handling issues and a buffer overrun bug.

formalpara.title: Prelinking relative paths
formalpara.para: The prelinker's --root option now works correctly with relative paths on the prelink command line and with relative paths in library dependencies (in ELF DT_NEEDED tags).

formalpara.title: Prelinker
formalpara.para: This release includes the GNU/Linux Object Prelinker.
